pe: During your Main Phase, if this card was activated this turn: You can destroy this card, and if you do, special summon 1 "Endless" monster from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Nox, the archangel of the endless" once per turn.
ef:
During your Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can activate 1 of these effect:
●Place 1 "Limit" Continuous Spell/Trap from your hand or Deck, face-up on your field. 
●Take 800 damage, then send 1 Level 7 LIGHT Warrior or EQUIP Spell from your Deck to GY.
If this card is sent to GY: You can special summon 1 DARK Warrior from your GY. During the end phase: You can destroy 1 card you control, and if you do, add this card to your hand. You can only use each effects of "<Limit Breaker> Phoenix ZERO" once per turn.
